update:
App Lifecycle Manager  is available in  Preview . 
 App Lifecycle Manager lets you store, host, manage, and monitor software as a service (SaaS) applications on Google Cloud.  
 To get started with App Lifecycle Manager:
 Familiarize yourself  with the App Lifecycle Manager ecosystem. 
 Create a SaaS offering . 
 Try the quickstart  to learn how to deploy a service instance using App Lifecycle Manager.
